Bus Timings

Detailed Info on Al Nahda 1 Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1 Bus Stop in Dubai

December 31, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1 Bus Stop is a crucial transit point in the vibrant Al Nahda area of Dubai. Catering to both residents and visitors, this bus stop is ideally situated to provide easy access to a range of local amenities, including shopping centers, dining establishments, and healthcare facilities. Whether you’re commuting for work or exploring the city, this stop serves as a convenient gateway to various destinations within Dubai.

Address

Al Nahda 1 Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google directions here.

Situated in the bustling Al Nahda area, the Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1 Bus Stop plays a crucial role in Dubai’s public transportation system. This stop is well-connected with key bus routes, ensuring smooth travel across the city. Its strategic location near essential amenities and popular landmarks makes it a valuable transit point for both residents and visitors navigating the vibrant Al Nahda neighborhood.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1 Bus Stop is served by the following bus routes with regular service throughout the day:

Bus Route Bus Station Timings
24 Al Nahda 2 7:39 PM
24 Al Nahda 2 7:59 PM
24 Al Nahda 2 8:19 PM
24 Al Nahda 2 8:39 PM

24 Al Nahda 2 11:05 PM

24 Al Nahda 2 9:14 AM
24 Al Nahda 2 9:34 AM
24 Al Nahda 2 9:54 AM
24 Al Nahda 2 10:23 AM
24 Al Nahda 2 10:55 AM

Bus Route Details

The Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1 Bus Stop is serviced by Bus Route 24, offering frequent connections throughout the day. This route provides crucial links to various parts of Dubai, ensuring reliable and accessible transportation for commuters.

  • Route 24: This route operates between Al Nahda 1 and Al Nahda 2. Buses start service early in the morning at 06:54 AM and run at consistent intervals until late at night, with the last bus departing at 12:38 AM. The service frequency ensures that passengers have ample options for travel throughout the day and night.

Nearby Destinations

The Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1 Bus Stop is well-positioned to offer easy access to a variety of local amenities:

Restaurants

  • Jabal Al Noor Cafeteria: Enjoy a variety of traditional dishes in a relaxed environment.

  • Orient Grill: Savor delicious grilled dishes with a touch of oriental flair.
  • Koyla Lounge and Cafe: Ideal for a casual meal or a cup of coffee in a cozy lounge setting.
  • It’s Malabar: Offers authentic Malabari cuisine with a focus on traditional flavors.
  • Calicut Chef: Renowned for its rich and spicy South Indian dishes.
  • Broccoli Pizza & Pista: A go-to spot for pizza and pasta lovers.
  • Hot Time: Known for its quick bites and flavorful snacks.
  • Meerz Restaurant & Cafe: Features a diverse menu catering to various tastes.
  • Madras Vegetarian: Specializes in vegetarian dishes with a South Indian touch.
  • Biggy African Restaurant: Offers a taste of African cuisine with an array of traditional dishes.

Landmarks

  • Fatimah Mohammed Ali Mosque: A significant religious site and architectural landmark.

  • ADIB ATM: Convenient ATM for banking needs.
  • RTA Parking Zone-231D: Provides parking facilities for visitors and commuters.
  • Dar Al Nahda Gents Salon: A local salon offering grooming services.
  • Jolly Web Designing Sharjah: Provides web design and development services.
  • Avo Studio: A creative space for various artistic and design projects.

Shopping Centers

  • Shaklan Market Supermarket: A local supermarket offering a range of everyday necessities.

  • Specs Shop: Specializes in eyewear and optical services.
  • Barber Shop: Provides haircuts and grooming services.
  • Mamzar Centre: A shopping mall with various retail and dining options.
  • Parking Shopping Mall: Offers shopping and parking facilities.
  • Sahara Centre Mall: A large shopping center with diverse stores and entertainment options.
  • Sara Shopping Mall: Features a range of shops and services.
  • Yas Perfumes: Known for a wide selection of fragrances and perfumes.
  • Taxi Stand Sahara Centre Dubai: Provides convenient taxi services for local and airport transfers.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Sahara Healthcare City: Offers a broad range of medical services and specialist care.

  • Miracle Home Healthcare: Provides home healthcare services tailored to individual needs.
  • Star Healthcare: Known for its comprehensive healthcare services and treatments.
  • Healthcare & Medical Royal Treatment: Offers specialized medical care and services.
  • Sahara HealthCare City Sharjah: Provides extensive healthcare facilities and services.
  • Olives Home Healthcare LLC: Offers personalized home healthcare solutions.

Pharmacies

  • Novo Nahda Sahara Pharmacy: Well-stocked with a variety of medicines and health products.

  • Abraj Sahara Pharmacy: Provides pharmaceutical products and medical supplies.
  • Thumbay Pharmacy: Known for its extensive range of medications and healthcare products.
  • Alexandria Pharmacy: Offers both prescription and over-the-counter medications.
  • Al Farah Pharmacy LLC: Provides a range of pharmaceutical services and products.
  • Aster Pharmacy 118: Features a wide selection of medicines and health supplies.
  • Bio Vista Pharmacy: Known for its quality pharmaceutical products and customer service.
  • Life Pharmacy Life Al Nahda: Offers comprehensive pharmaceutical services and health products.
  • Aster Pharmacy 121: Provides a range of health products and medications.
  • Kareem AlNahda Pharmacy LLC: Known for its personalized pharmacy services.

Accommodation

  • Emirates Star Hotel Apartments: Offers comfortable and convenient hotel apartment stays.

  • Lavender Hotel Apartments Al-Nahda: Provides a range of amenities for short and long-term stays.
  • Miramar Hotel Apartments: Features well-equipped apartments for travelers.
  • Samaya Apartments: Offers a home-like atmosphere with various facilities.
  • Nawras Hotel Apartments: Known for its quality service and comfortable accommodations.
  • Golden Crown Hotel Apartments: Provides a range of apartment options for visitors.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 2(15m): 19

  2. Al Nahda 1, Terminus 1(206m): 19, 20A, 22, 24, X22

  3. Nahda 1, Enoc(247m): 13D, 20A, 24, F22, F23A, F24

  4. Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2(274m): 20A, 20B, 22, 107, F23, F23A, X22

  5. Al Khalifa Saif Building 1(341m): 19

The Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1 Bus Stop is not just a transit point but a central hub in a lively and diverse community. Whether you’re heading to work, shopping, or simply exploring the area, this bus stop offers a practical and convenient way to navigate the city efficiently.
